JUDGE: DOUGLAS C. MUNSON REDPORTER:MARY HINDS, CLERK: DAVID SWANSON, DEPT. 303. CASE ASSIGNED THIS DAY FOR UNCONTESTED MATTER. MICHAEL V. MAHONEY APPEARED FOR PLATF. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. CT READ AND CONSIDERED DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY & HEARD ARGUMENT BY COUNSEL. MATTER SUBMITTED COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF PLAITNTIFF CAPITOL ON BANKD AND AGAINST DEFENDANT ALLAN B. SALIM AND AWARDED DAMAGES OF $3,813.74, ATTORNEY FEES $720.00, COSTS $141.00 AND INTEREST $167.38 FOR TOTAL OF $4,842.12. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN CT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALIM, ALLAN B $3,813.74 PRINCIPAL, $720.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $167.38 INTEREST, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,842.12
